subjects.description: A group of pedestrians crossing the road ahead of the ego vehicle, consisting of adults and a child, some carrying colorful balloons including bright green ones. They wear casual urban clothing.
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed group of people in everyday attire — jackets, jeans, sneakers. Several hold balloon strings, with balloons bobbing above their heads. The balloons include red, yellow, blue, and notably bright green ones.
subjects.relationship: Pedestrians crossing in front of the ego vehicle, the reason the car is stopped
subjects.location: Center to center-right of the frame, in the crosswalk area ahead
subjects.orientation: Walking from right to left across the road, mostly perpendicular to the camera
subjects.pose: Upright walking posture, arms at sides or raised holding balloon strings
subjects.action: Walking across the crosswalk carrying balloons
subjects.state_changes: Pedestrians gradually move from right to left across the frame and begin to clear the road; a bright green balloon enters the scene from the right side as the last pedestrians cross
subjects.clothing: Casual urban clothing: a woman in a tan trench coat and jeans, a man in a dark navy hoodie and grey pants, a child in a red puffer jacket and dark leggings
subjects.expression: Relaxed, conversational expressions; the child looks cheerful and excited
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Varied light to medium skin tones, natural texture
subjects.facial_features: Not prominently visible due to medium distance from camera; general outlines of faces visible

subjects.description: A red octagonal stop sign / traffic sign visible on the right side of the road ahead, displaying a red signal indicating the vehicle must stop
subjects.appearance_details: Standard red traffic stop sign on a metal pole, clearly visible with white 'STOP' text. Additionally, a traffic signal nearby showing a solid red light throughout the video
subjects.relationship: The regulatory sign/signal commanding the ego vehicle to remain stopped
subjects.location: Right side of frame, slightly above center, at the intersection ahead
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera / ego vehicle directly
subjects.state_changes: No significant change — remains red throughout the entire video

subjects.description: Bright green balloon — a large, vivid lime-green helium balloon on a string, carried by a pedestrian entering from the right side of the frame in the last segment
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy, reflective bright green latex balloon, round shape, bobbing slightly with movement, catching sunlight with a specular highlight
subjects.relationship: Carried by one of the last pedestrians; its entrance into the scene coincides with the ego vehicle beginning to move despite the red signal
subjects.location: Enters from the right edge of frame, moves toward center-right
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame but visually prominent due to color
subjects.orientation: Floating above its carrier, facing the camera indirectly
subjects.action: Bobbing gently as the carrier walks across the crosswalk
subjects.state_changes: Appears at the right edge of frame around 3 seconds, moves leftward as the carrier crosses

subjects.description: The ego vehicle — the viewer's car, visible only through dashboard elements at the very bottom of the frame including the hood edge and part of the dashboard
subjects.appearance_details: Dark-colored car hood visible at the bottom of the frame, slight reflection on the hood surface from daylight
subjects.relationship: The camera car / viewer's perspective vehicle; stopped at the intersection and then begins to move
subjects.relative_size: Large within frame (occupies lower portion as ego view)
subjects.action: Initially stationary, then begins to accelerate forward
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from stationary to moving forward at approximately 3 seconds into the video

background_setting: An urban city intersection on a two-lane road lined with mid-rise commercial buildings on both sides. The road surface is dark grey asphalt with faded white lane markings and a painted crosswalk. Trees with light spring foliage are planted along the sidewalks. Parked cars line both sides of the road. A traffic signal pole stands on the right side with a red light illuminated. The sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue. Storefronts with awnings are visible in the background. A few distant vehicles are visible further down the road.

lighting.conditions: Bright daylight with partly cloudy sky, natural ambient light
lighting.direction: Front-lit to slightly top-lit, with sunlight coming from above and slightly ahead of the vehicle
lighting.shadows: Moderate shadows cast by buildings on the left side of the road; pedestrian shadows fall to the left on the asphalt; dappled shadows from street trees
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm, natural daylight illumination giving a slightly golden cast to the scene; specular highlights on the green balloon and car hoods

aesthetics.composition: First-person ego perspective from behind the windshield, the road converging toward a vanishing point at center frame, traffic sign positioned on the right third, pedestrians occupying the middle ground across the crosswalk
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted urban tones of grey asphalt, beige and brown buildings, punctuated by vivid pops of bright green, red (traffic signal and stop sign), yellow, and blue from the balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Slightly tense urban driving moment, casual pedestrian activity contrasted with the driver's impatient decision to move on red
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating vertical lines of building facades and window grids; rhythmic sequence of parked cars along the curb

cinematography.camera_motion: Static for the first 3 seconds while the vehicle is stopped; then subtle forward drift and slight vibration as the vehicle begins moving in the final 2 seconds
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the ego/dashcam perspective capturing the full width of the road and intersection
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, approximately driver's seat height, looking straight ahead through the windshield
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep — both the nearby dashboard edge and the distant buildings are in reasonable focus
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the crosswalk area and pedestrians in the mid-ground; traffic sign also in focus
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 28mm equivalent, typical dashcam field of view

artistic_style: Realistic dashcam / ego-vehicle footage, cinematic quality
context: An urban driving scenario depicting a vehicle stopped at a red traffic signal while pedestrians with balloons cross; the vehicle improperly begins moving when a bright green balloon enters the frame while the light is still red

actions.description: The ego vehicle is stationary at the intersection. The red traffic signal and stop sign are clearly visible. A group of pedestrians begins crossing the road from right to left in the crosswalk, some carrying colorful balloons (red, yellow, blue).
Pedestrians continue crossing the road. The child in the red jacket waves a small balloon. The group moves steadily leftward. The traffic signal remains red. The vehicle stays stopped.

A new pedestrian enters from the right edge carrying a bright green balloon that bobs into the scene. Almost simultaneously, the ego vehicle begins to creep forward — the camera drifts ahead, the road and crosswalk markings start moving beneath. The traffic signal is still clearly red. The bright green balloon is prominently visible as the car accelerates gently, creating a sense of premature departure.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold capital letters on a red octagonal sign, standard road-sign font, medium size
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right side of the frame at mid-height, visible throughout the entire video from 0:00 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Standard traffic stop sign at the intersection commanding the ego vehicle to stop

segments.description: The ego vehicle is fully stopped at the intersection. The red traffic signal and STOP sign are visible. Pedestrians with balloons begin entering the crosswalk from the right.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians appear in the crosswalk; the scene is established from the driver's perspective
segments.camera: Completely static, dashcam/ego perspective, no motion

segments.description: Pedestrians continue crossing the road carrying colorful balloons. The vehicle remains stopped. The traffic light stays red.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians move from right to left across the frame; balloons bob gently; the crossing group is at its densest
segments.camera: Static, slight ambient vibration from idle engine

segments.description: A bright green balloon enters the frame from the right, carried by a new pedestrian. The ego vehicle begins to move forward despite the traffic signal still being red. The road starts scrolling beneath, and the crosswalk markings drift downward in frame.
segments.key_changes: Bright green balloon enters scene; vehicle transitions from stationary to moving; forward camera drift begins; tension arises from running the red light
segments.camera: Camera begins drifting forward smoothly with slight vibration as the vehicle accelerates gently; perspective shifts as objects in frame grow larger

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the video opens from the ego perspective of a car stopped at a city intersection. A red traffic signal and a STOP sign are clearly visible on the right. At 0:01, a group of pedestrians — adults and a child — begin crossing the road from right to left on the crosswalk, carrying colorful balloons in red, yellow, and blue that bob above their heads. By 0:02, the pedestrians are mid-crossing, chatting casually, with the child looking cheerful in a red puffer jacket. The vehicle remains stationary. At 0:03, a new pedestrian carrying a bright, vivid green helium balloon enters the frame from the right side. Almost immediately, the ego vehicle begins to creep forward — the camera drifts ahead and the asphalt beneath starts moving. The traffic signal is still glowing red. From 0:04 to 0:05, the car continues to accelerate gently, the bright green balloon prominent in the scene as the remaining pedestrians are still near the crosswalk. The red light persists, highlighting the driver's premature departure from the stop.
audio_description: Ambient urban sounds: the low hum of the idling car engine, distant city traffic noise, muffled voices of pedestrians chatting as they cross. A faint rustling of balloon strings in a light breeze. At around 3 seconds, the engine revs slightly as the vehicle begins to move, accompanied by the soft crunch of tires on asphalt. No music. No horn sounds.
